content.text:
Here's the result of running `cat -n` on /Users/ertugrulsahin/Codalio/demo-project-v4/booking-app/.rhino-plan.md:
     1	# Implementation Plan: BookEase
     2	
     3	## Summary
     4	BookEase is a hybrid booking platform built on the Rhino V4 Rails API framework. It allows service businesses to manage services, staff, and availability through an organization-scoped multi-tenant API, while customers browse active services and available time slots and create bookings through a single-tenant public route.
     5	
     6	## PRD gaps compensated
     7	- **KEY_FEATURE_NO_SITEMAP**: The PRD lacks a formal sitemap section. We have defined the screens and routes in this plan based on the route groups and permissions matrix.
     8	- **DATA_MODEL_UX_MISMATCH**: The `time_slots` model table in Section 6 does not list `organization_id`, but Section 4 states it is scoped by `organization_id`. We have explicitly added `organization_id` to the `time_slots` blueprint and migration to ensure robust multi-tenant scoping and indexing.
     9	
    10	## Blueprint inventory
    11	A blueprint YAML has been written for each of these models. Develop stage will run `bundle exec rails agentcode:blueprint` to materialize them.
    12	
    13	- `.agentcode/blueprints/_roles.yaml` — roles: owner, admin, staff, customer
    14	- `.agentcode/blueprints/services.yaml` — Service model
    15	- `.agentcode/blueprints/staff_members.yaml` — StaffMember model
    16	- `.agentcode/blueprints/time_slots.yaml` — TimeSlot model
    17	- `.agentcode/blueprints/bookings.yaml` — Booking model
    18	
    19	## Models (reference)
    20	
    21	### Service
    22	- Ownership: organization-scoped (`belongs_to_organization: true`)
    23	- Key fields: `name` (string, non-nullable), `description` (text), `duration_minutes` (integer), `price` (decimal), `status` (string, default: "draft")
    24	- Relationships: `belongs_to :organization`, `has_many :time_slots`
    25	
    26	### StaffMember
    27	- Ownership: organization-scoped (`belongs_to_organization: true`)
    28	- Key fields: `name` (string, non-nullable), `email` (string), `role_title` (string)
    29	- Relationships: `belongs_to :organization`, `has_many :time_slots`
    30	
    31	### TimeSlot
    32	- Ownership: organization-scoped (`belongs_to_organization: true`)
    33	- Key fields: `service_id` (foreignId, non-nullable), `staff_member_id` (foreignId, nullable), `starts_at` (datetime, non-nullable), `ends_at` (datetime, non-nullable), `available` (boolean, default: true)
    34	- Relationships: `belongs_to :organization`, `belongs_to :service`, `belongs_to :staff_member`, `has_one :booking`
    35	
    36	### Booking
    37	- Ownership: organization-scoped (`belongs_to_organization: true`)
    38	- Key fields: `user_id` (foreignId, non-nullable), `time_slot_id` (foreignId, non-nullable), `status` (string, default: "pending"), `notes` (text)
    39	- Relationships: `belongs_to :organization`, `belongs_to :user`, `belongs_to :time_slot`
    40	
    41	## Extras (NOT covered by blueprint — develop stage implements these by hand)
    42	
    43	### ServiceScope
    44	- **Model + action:** `Service#index`
    45	- **Rule:** On the customer route, filter services to `status: active`. Staff/admins see all services.
    46	- **Where the code lives:** `app/models/scopes/service_scope.rb`
    47	- **Acceptance criterion:** AC-9, AC-10
    48	
    49	### TimeSlotScope
    50	- **Model + action:** `TimeSlot#index`
    51	- **Rule:** On the customer route, filter time slots to `available: true`. Staff/admins see all slots.
    52	- **Where the code lives:** `app/models/scopes/time_slot_scope.rb`
    53	- **Acceptance criterion:** AC-9, AC-10
    54	
    55	### BookingScope
    56	- **Model + action:** `Booking#index`
    57	- **Rule:** On the customer route, filter bookings to `user_id: current_user.id`. Staff/admins see all bookings in their organization.
    58	- **Where the code lives:** `app/models/scopes/booking_scope.rb`
    59	- **Acceptance criterion:** AC-8
    60	
    61	### Booking Availability Callback
    62	- **Model + action:** `Booking#create`
    63	- **Rule:** Creating a booking marks the associated `TimeSlot` as unavailable (`available: false`).
    64	- **Where the code lives:** `app/models/booking.rb` (after_create callback)
    65	- **Acceptance criterion:** AC-5
    66	
    67	### Booking Cancellation Policy
    68	- **Model + action:** `Booking#update`
    69	- **Rule:** Customers can only update their own bookings to set status to `cancelled` if the current status is `pending`.
    70	- **Where the code lives:** `app/policies/booking_policy.rb`
    71	- **Acceptance criterion:** AC-6
    72	
    73	## Screens
    74	Since there is no UI prototype, Rhino's auto-generated CRUD screens will be used for all resources.
    75	- **Staff Service Management:** `/api/:organization/services` (auto-generated CRUD)
    76	- **Staff Availability Management:** `/api/:organization/time_slots` (auto-generated CRUD)
    77	- **Staff Booking Management:** `/api/:organization/bookings` (auto-generated CRUD)
    78	- **Customer Catalog:** `/api/customer/services` and `/api/customer/time_slots` (auto-generated CRUD with custom scopes)
    79	- **Customer Bookings:** `/api/customer/bookings` (auto-generated CRUD with custom scopes)
    80	
    81	## Key files reference
    82	- `config/routes.rb` — Route group configuration
    83	- `config/initializers/rhino.rb` — Resource registration and middleware configuration
    84	- `app/models/service.rb` — Service model and validations
    85	- `app/models/staff_member.rb` — StaffMember model and validations
    86	- `app/models/time_slot.rb` — TimeSlot model and validations
    87	- `app/models/booking.rb` — Booking model, validations, and callbacks
    88	- `app/models/scopes/service_scope.rb` — Service customer-route scope
    89	- `app/models/scopes/time_slot_scope.rb` — TimeSlot customer-route scope
    90	- `app/models/scopes/booking_scope.rb` — Booking customer-route scope
    91	- `app/policies/booking_policy.rb` — Booking custom update policy
    92	- `db/seeds.rb` — Seed data for organizations, roles, and users
    93	
    94	## Per-AC Implementation Map
    95	
    96	| AC | Phase | Belongs to | Primary file(s) | Library / hook | Notes |
    97	| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
    98	| AC-1 | MVP | Hybrid Tenancy Route Groups | `config/routes.rb`, `config/initializers/rhino.rb` | Rhino Route Groups | Configure staff and customer route groups |
    99	| AC-2 | MVP | Service Management | `app/models/service.rb`, `.agentcode/blueprints/services.yaml` | Rhino Blueprint | Service model with status active/draft/inactive |
   100	| AC-3 | MVP | Staff Members Management | `app/models/staff_member.rb`, `.agentcode/blueprints/staff_members.yaml` | Rhino Blueprint | StaffMember model |
   101	| AC-4 | MVP | Time Slot Management | `app/models/time_slot.rb`, `.agentcode/blueprints/time_slots.yaml` | Rhino Blueprint | TimeSlot model with available boolean |
   102	| AC-5 | MVP | Customer Booking Creation | `app/models/booking.rb`, `.agentcode/blueprints/bookings.yaml` | Rhino Callback | Booking creation marks slot as unavailable |
   103	| AC-6 | MVP | Booking Lifecycle | `app/models/booking.rb`, `app/policies/booking_policy.rb` | Rhino Policy | Restrict customer updates to cancelling pending bookings |
   104	| AC-7 | MVP | Cross-Tenant Isolation | `app/models/service.rb`, `app/models/staff_member.rb`, `app/models/time_slot.rb`, `app/models/booking.rb` | Rhino Multi-tenancy | Enforce organization_id scoping |
   105	| AC-8 | MVP | Cross-User Isolation | `app/models/scopes/booking_scope.rb` | Rhino Scope | Filter bookings to current_user.id on customer route |
   106	| AC-9 | MVP | Draft/Inactive Hiding | `app/models/scopes/service_scope.rb`, `app/models/scopes/time_slot_scope.rb` | Rhino Scope | Filter services to active and slots to available |
   107	| AC-10 | MVP | Active-Only Customer Catalog | `app/models/scopes/service_scope.rb`, `app/models/scopes/time_slot_scope.rb` | Rhino Scope | Ensure customer catalog is active-only |
   108	| AC-11 | MVP | Staff Write Protection | `app/policies/service_policy.rb`, `app/policies/staff_member_policy.rb`, `app/policies/time_slot_policy.rb` | Rhino Policy | Prevent customers from modifying staff resources |
   109	| AC-12 | MVP | Index Exclusion | `app/controllers/api/services_controller.rb` | Rhino Controller | Index returns empty/filtered list instead of 404 |
   110	| AC-13 | MVP | Unauthenticated Access | `config/initializers/rhino.rb` | Rhino Auth | Ensure all routes require authentication |
   111	| AC-14 | MVP | Seed Data | `db/seeds.rb` | Rails Seeds | Seed organizations, roles, and users |
   112	| AC-15 | MVP | Gap compensation: Time Slot Organization ID | `app/models/time_slot.rb`, `.agentcode/blueprints/time_slots.yaml` | Rhino Blueprint | Add organization_id to time_slots |
   113	
   114	## Implementation order (recommended stage flow)
   115	
   116	1. **Plan** — This planning stage (blueprints, plan, criteria, index).
   117	2. **Develop** — Run `bundle exec rails agentcode:blueprint` to generate models and migrations. Implement custom scopes, callbacks, policies, and seeds. Write unit and integration tests.
   118	3. **Test** — Run `bundle exec rails test` to verify all isolation and business logic tests pass.
   119	4. **Review** — Verify PRD compliance and test coverage.
   120
